summary: Handcrafted 8-D vibration features with SVM for a simple, reproducible classical baseline.

stratified.notes: Train and eval on same stratified split. Fair development comparison.

temporal.notes: Train on stratified (all 3 classes visible), eval on temporal test [70,100.1]%. This mirrors deep model phase-1 pretraining and is the fair temporal comparison for classical models.

temporal_pure.notes: Train on temporal [0,70]% only. NOTE: temporal train data has zero Fault examples (only Healthy+Degrading), so Fault F1=0 is expected by construction, not a model failure. Do not use this for paper comparison.
